name: Cumin Baked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients and set aside.
2. Place the chicken snugly in a shallow baking dish. Rub three-quarters of the spices under the skin and the remainder over the top. You can refrigerate at this point for up to 24 hours.
3. Squeeze lemon juice over the chicken, scatter olives over, and drizzle with oil.
4. Bake uncovered at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 to 60 minutes. Baste occasionally with pan juices.
5. Serve with sliced lemons.
Makes 4 servings.
